text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before Seiun Sky is set to run in the Kyoto
Daishoten, the results of the Mainichi Okan are
announced.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka, the Otherworldly Front-Runner,
has beaten El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder by
an incredible margin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Seiun Sky's fighting spirit ignited, she's
determined to excite the crowd at Kyoto far more
than they were in Tokyo.
